ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
Colby Dean LaVelle, Esq., specially appearing for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
